title: Static sites configuration
description: Central registry that maps each static site to its AWS S3 buckets and CloudFront distributions per environment.

defaults.description: Values applied to every site unless overridden at the site level.

name.description: Internal identifier. Must match the folder name under sites/. Lowercase, kebab-case.

sourceDir.description: Path to the site folder relative to the repository root, e.g. sites/example-site.

outputDir.description: Directory (relative to sourceDir) that contains the deployable artifacts after build.

buildCommand.description: Shell command to build the site. Empty string means 'no build, deploy sourceDir/src directly'.

bucket.description: S3 bucket name that hosts this site for this environment.

distributionId.description: CloudFront distribution ID used to serve and invalidate this site.

domain.description: Public domain (used for docs / alternate domain names).
